name: conform-range-forms
description: Drop-in PM conformance fixture: the four declared range forms isolated — exact (2.1.3), caret (^4.1.5), tilde (~4.0.0), and a compound range (>=7 <8). Each is stored verbatim in the importer/dependencies block; a writer that re-normalizes a range (caret->exact, or collapsing a compound range) churns Direction B.
